title: paramignya hispida
intro: Paramignya hispida, also known as the Borneo cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Borneo. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paramignya hispida include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Paramignya hispida include decoctions, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to make topical creams and ointments for skin care and other medicinal purposes.
